title: elsholtzia saxatilis
intro: Elsholtzia saxatilis, also known as Thai basil or mountain basil, is a perennial herb native to China, Korea, and Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Elsholtzia saxatilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
